documentation.file_docstring: Account resolution: reads config from channels.synology-chat, merges per-account overrides, falls back to environment variables.
inline_comments: List all configured account IDs for this channel. Returns ["default"] if there's a base config, plus any named accounts.
If base config has a token, there's a "default" account
Resolve a specific account by ID with full defaults applied. Falls back to env vars for the "default" account.
Env var fallbacks (primarily for the "default" account)
Merge: account override > base channel config > env var

functions.name: listAccountIds
functions.doc: List all configured account IDs for this channel.   Returns ["default"] if there's a base config, plus any named account

functions.name: resolveAccount
functions.doc: Resolve a specific account by ID with full defaults applied.   Falls back to env vars for the "default" account.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: business_logic, auth, logging
